IRifyHome.pageSubtitle: Distinguish AI online audit from SSA offline rule audit, and view scan results and risk posture in one place

AuditMode.aiSubtitle: Best for: complex business logic / explanation needed / assisted analysis
AuditMode.aiFeature1: Handles complex business logic, cross-file correlation, natural language analysis, and risk explanation
AuditMode.aiFeature2: Supports online knowledge enhancement, scenario understanding, root cause analysis, and fix suggestions
AuditMode.aiSkillSubtitle: Best for: Skill / rule-specific / process-driven audit
AuditMode.aiSkillFeature1: Specialized analysis for Skill and rule-based audit scenarios, covering Skill authoring and execution flow
AuditMode.aiSkillFeature2: Combines online knowledge with the rule library to explain and locate Skill safety and logic risks
AuditMode.traditionalFeature1: Analyze code behavior through audit rules to find risky code fragments
AuditMode.scanFeature2: Freely select rule groups for code scanning
AuditMode.scanFeature3: Helps analyze code structure and find risky code fragments

QuickAccess.ruleManagementDesc: Add, delete, modify, and group rules, and upload rules
QuickAccess.javaDecompilerDesc: Decompile compiled bytecode files into human-readable Java source code
QuickAccess.auditHoleDesc: View all vulnerabilities found during code scanning or auditing
QuickAccess.projectManagementDesc: Manage all projects compiled and scanned
